name: Chicken 'n' Vegetable Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 each Medium Red or Green Pepper
1 each Enriched Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. Cut sweet peppers into thin strips.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Cook chicken with vegetables until chicken is golden and vegetables are crisp-tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Thoroughly blend the enriched golden onion soup mix, cornstarch, ground ginger, water, soy sauce, and vinegar in a bowl.
5. Stir the blended mixture into the skillet and bring to a boil. Simmer uncovered for 2-3 minutes or until the sauce thickens.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice and garnish with sliced green onion and toasted sesame seeds if desired.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. In a 2-quart casserole, heat chicken (without oil) covered at HIGH (Full Power) for 4 minutes until almost done. Remove the chicken.
2. Add vegetables to the casserole and heat uncovered for 5 minutes at HIGH (Full Power).
3. Thoroughly blend the enriched golden onion soup mix, cornstarch, ground ginger, water, soy sauce, and vinegar in a bowl.
4. Stir into the vegetables and heat uncovered for 5 minutes at HIGH (Full Power) until the sauce thickens.
5. Return chicken to the casserole and heat covered for 1 minute.
6. Let stand covered for 5 minutes before serving.
